summary: Iteration 2: full backend + frontend coverage of new features (therapist self-signup, admin approve/reject, sweep loop, matching filter for pending therapists). 16/16 backend tests pass; all targeted UI flows pass.

minor.issue: Returns 200 (not 201) on create. Spec accepts either; consider 201 for REST consistency.
Still uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context (DeprecationWarning).

issues: 7 stat tiles render in a single row at 1920px which is fine; below ~1280px they may wrap awkwardly. Not tested at smaller breakpoints.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate FastAPI startup/shutdown to lifespan context manager.
critical_code_review_comments: Matching engine correctly excludes pending_approval=true and is_active=false therapists via {is_active: {$ne: false}, pending_approval: {$ne: true}} — verified end-to-end.

Sweep loop runs every SWEEP_INTERVAL_SECONDS (default 300s); _sweep_overdue_results query correctly uses verified=true, results_sent_at=null, verified_at <= cutoff (ISO string compare works because ISO format is lexicographically sortable).
Backfill on startup sets is_active=True / pending_approval=False / source='seed' for legacy docs, ensuring seed therapists are eligible for matching after deploy of new feature.
Approve emits send_therapist_approved task; reject does NOT email the rejected therapist (intentional per UX, but consider documenting).
Admin endpoints still rely on a single static header password without rate limiting (carryover from iter 1).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (signup happy path, nav link, admin dashboard tabs, approve, reject, regression to requests tab)

seed_data_creation: Tests created and then cleaned up TEST_-prefixed therapists/requests/applications. Final DB state: 100 seed therapists, 0 test requests/apps.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Iteration2 test file is /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2_signup.py — uses motor for direct MongoDB token retrieval (verification_token still not exposed via API). Age option testids on /therapists/join use slug values like 'adult-18-64' (not 'Adult'). Admin dashboard tabs: data-testid='tab-requests' / 'tab-therapists'. Approve/reject buttons: data-testid='approve-{id}' / 'reject-{id}'. Pending review stat tile is highlighted with terracotta border when count > 0.
verified_features: POST /api/therapists/signup happy path (200, returns id+status=pending_approval, persists is_active=true, pending_approval=true, source=signup)
POST /api/therapists/signup duplicate email -> 409
POST /api/therapists/signup missing fields -> 422
POST /api/therapists/signup invalid email -> 422
GET /api/admin/therapists?pending=true returns only pending
GET /api/admin/therapists?pending=false returns only approved (>= 100 seed)
POST /api/admin/therapists/{id}/approve flips pending_approval=false, is_active=true, sets approved_at
POST /api/admin/therapists/{id}/reject sets is_active=false, pending_approval=false
POST /api/admin/therapists/unknown/approve -> 404
POST /api/admin/therapists/.../approve without admin header -> 401
GET /api/admin/stats includes pending_therapists integer
CRITICAL: pending therapist with broad specialties NOT included in notified_therapist_ids after request verify+match; AFTER approval and resend-notifications they DO appear
_sweep_overdue_results function executes without error against current DB
Backend logs contain 'Started results sweep loop'
Regression: /api/, /api/admin/stats, /api/admin/requests, /api/admin/therapists all 200
FRONTEND /therapists/join: page loads with multi-section form, submit disabled until name(>=3)+email+>=1 specialty+>=1 age+>=1 modality, shows 'Profile received' confirmation on success
FRONTEND header: 'For therapists' link navigates to /therapists/join
FRONTEND admin dashboard: 7 stat tiles including highlighted 'Pending review', tabs 'Patient requests' and 'Therapist signups' both work
FRONTEND admin: approve removes therapist from list with success toast; reject removes therapist with 'Therapist rejected' toast
FRONTEND admin: switching back to requests tab still shows requests-table
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no critical bugs found. The most-important regression check (pending therapists must not be matched) is verified passing end-to-end.
